hero.videoFallback: Your browser does not support HTML5 videos.
hero.description: Managing your properties shouldn't be this complicated. DomoNow centralizes everything in one comprehensive, simple, and secure app for your entire community.

problemSection.title: "You work day and night, yet residents remain
problemSection.subtitle: Top 8 frustrations driving you away from your community:

problems.title: You answer all day, yet nobody notices
problems.desc: Daily calls and messages. No one remembers you actually responded.

problems.title: Payments never arrive in full
problems.desc: Unregistered receipts, and you end up being the one to blame.

problems.title: I reported that weeks ago and it's still the same
problems.desc: The issue persists and nobody knows you already handled it.

problems.title: What are they spending our money on?
problems.desc: There's no simple way to show transparency.

problems.title: Calls at any hour?
problems.desc: Your personal phone is the 24/7 complaint hotline.

problems.title: You explained the decision, but it caused conflict
problems.desc: Even though you communicated, people still disagree.

problems.title: Two families booked the same thing
problems.desc: Same date, same hall. The paper log doesn't work.

problems.title: Nobody ever tells me anything here
problems.desc: You send 3 notices and someone always claims they 'didn't know'.

solutionSection.title: With DomoNow, the management you dreamed of
features: Forget about WhatsApp, Excel, emails, and scattered calls.
Reduce your delinquency by up to 40% without chasing anyone.
From the report to the resolution, everything is recorded.
If you know how to use WhatsApp, you already know how to use DomoNow.

authoritySection.eyebrow: [ We know what walking in your shoes feels like ]
authoritySection.title: Results that speak for themselves
authoritySection.subtitle: That's why we created DomoNow: to lighten your load, not to complicate things further.
authoritySection.card1Desc: Our platform improves your numbers month after month.
authoritySection.card2Desc: Manage 2 units or 200. A solid infrastructure that won't leave you stranded when you need it most.
authoritySection.card3Quote: DomoNow completely changed how I manage. Now everything is clear, organized, and under control. I no longer live putting out fires.

steps.title: Schedule your demo
steps.desc: We show you how the app works in YOUR context: your pain points and your priorities.

steps.title: Risk-free pilot
steps.desc: Start with DomoNow in one of your properties for 30 days. No fine print.

steps.title: Activate and see real results
steps.desc: We set everything up for you: users, permissions, modules. You just focus on managing better.

summarySection.title: Managing shouldn't be a synonym for
summarySection.subtitle: DomoNow centralizes what matters so you stop reacting and start planning

items.title: Less time searching
items.desc: Spend less time looking for scattered information.

items.title: More clarity
items.desc: More clarity in every decision you make.

summarySection.bottomText: Your community notices the difference: faster responses, more transparent management, fewer complaints.

comercial.title: Ready to manage your commercial properties with more control and efficiency?
comercial.text: Centralize operations, improve tenant experience, and maintain full traceability of access, requests, and updates with DomoNow.

mixta.title: Ready to manage your mixed-use property with greater control and efficiency?
mixta.text: Centralize residential and commercial operations in a single platform, improve the experience for residents and tenants, and maintain clear traceability of access, requests, billing, and updates.

residencial.title: Ready to take your residential property management to the next level?
residencial.text: Discover how DomoNow helps you reduce operational conflicts and improve the experience for residents and management.

general.title: Take control of your community.
general.text: Discover how DomoNow centralizes security, finances, and community living in one intuitive platform.

common.ctaSchedule: I want to schedule a Demo

communications.tagline: Clear notices that reach everyone, instantly
communications.heroProblem: Notices nobody opens. Memos that never arrive. There's always someone who 'didn't know.'
communications.heroSolution: DomoNow centralizes your communications. Everyone gets the right message at the right time.

useCases.desc: Notices about water cuts, fumigation, and more
Changes to internal rules and regulations
Notices about pets, noise, or space usage

howItWorks.solution: Know who read it and who didn't

communications.problemQuote: "Communication in a community shouldn't depend on WhatsApp or bulletin boards nobody reads. The lack of an official channel breeds misinformation, distrust, and conflict."

problems.title: Invisible Memos
problems.desc: Notices that take weeks to arrive

problems.title: Misinformation Complaints
problems.desc: Residents claiming they were never informed

solutions.title: Targeted Notices
solutions.desc: Messages by tower, floor, or group

steps.title: Create the notice
steps.desc: Management drafts the message and selects recipients.

steps.title: Send and confirm
steps.desc: Each resident receives a notification and the system records who opened it.

steps.title: Check the history
steps.desc: Everything is saved. Anyone can look up previous notices.

communications.cta: Centralize your community's notices with DomoNow. No WhatsApp groups. No excuses. No misinformation.

accessControl.tagline: Smart security that protects your community
accessControl.heroProblem: Lost logbooks, unregistered visitors, and nobody knows who came in.
accessControl.heroSolution: DomoNow records every access. Everything is traced, secure, and available instantly.

documents.heroTitle: "Where can I find the community guidelines?"
documents.heroProblem: Files in personal folders that take forever to find.
documents.heroSolution: DomoNow centralizes all documents. Find what you need in seconds.

useCases.desc: Residents look up the community guidelines
The board reviews minutes and documents in seconds
New residents access key information from day one
Management answers queries without searching one by one

requests.tagline: Report and follow up without intermediaries
requests.heroTitle: Take a photo or video and report your request in seconds
requests.heroProblem: A resident reports a problem, but nobody responds and the issue remains.
requests.heroSolution: DomoNow centralizes requests. They are assigned, managed, and nobody is left without an answer.

voting.heroProblem: Few attend, there aren't enough votes, decisions are not valid.
voting.heroSolution: DomoNow digitizes official voting. Valid remote participation and real-time results.

commonAreas.tagline: Common areas available at the click of a button
commonAreas.heroTitle: "Is the social hall free on Saturday?"
commonAreas.heroProblem: These questions lead to conflicts among residents.
commonAreas.heroSolution: DomoNow organizes bookings in real time. No conflicts, no misunderstandings.

financial.heroProblem: Outdated spreadsheets and numbers that don't add up?
financial.heroSolution: DomoNow centralizes finances in real time. Total transparency, always available.
